calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Miton For Discharge From Interpleader Action By Navigators Insurance Company; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Shashauna Szczechowicz, Esq. of Wolkin Curran, Tel. 415.982.9390, for Plaintiff and also specially appearing for Jason Jungreis, Esq., for defendant.

RULING: The language of the stipulation and proposed order was discussed. After hearing, the court adopted its tentative ruling on the motion. PLAINTIFF NAVIGATORS INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Discharge From Interpleader Action is off calendar per stipulation. The stipulation & order re: Defendant Bolex was signed. Per the representation of plaintiff's counsel, defendant's counsel has no objection to striking portion(s) of paragraph 5 of the proposed order. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Notice Of Motion And Miton For Discharge From Interpleader Action By Navigators Insurance Company; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Continued To Aug-22-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF NAVIGATORS INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion For Discharge From Interpleader Action By Navigators Insurance Company is Continued to August 22, 2012 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 per the agreement of the parties. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976
